name: Potato Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil potatoes until tender; drain.
2. Heat cream with 1/3 cup butter and whisk into potatoes.
3. Cut bread into small cubes; toss in remaining butter and toast at 350°F for 5 minutes.
4. Sauté onion and celery in the remaining butter until crisp, then remove from heat.
5. Stir in seasoning and parsley.
6. In a large bowl, mix potatoes, giblets, and onion mixture.
7. Stir in beaten eggs, then add toasted bread cubes.
8. Stuff bird (do not pack), truss, and roast as usual. Alternatively, spoon into a greased 13 x 9 x 2 inch baking pan, cover, and bake at 350°F for 40 minutes; uncover and bake an additional 20 minutes.
